requirement_topic.en: TISI product-conformity regime and TIS mark for lithium batteries and power banks
requirement_topic.zh: TISI锂电池与移动电源合规体系与TIS标识
requirement_topic.zht: TISI鋰電池與行動電源合規體系與TIS標識

summary.en: Controlled battery products are placed under Thailand's TISI framework managed by the Ministry of Industry, with compulsory product conformity routes and a TIS mark requirement where applicable. For many lithium battery and power bank categories, TIS 2879-2560 is the practical route on an IEC 62133 basis, and Thai imports must align product packaging and marking with in-country rules. In-market placement is handled by a local importer or licence holder, with customs and compliance handover usually at Laem Chabang and Bangkok ports.
summary.zh: 受控制的电池产品受泰国工业部管理的TISI框架约束，适用范围内需履行强制合格评定并加贴TIS标识。对多数锂电池和移动电源类别，通常按基于IEC 62133的TIS 2879-2560执行，泰国入境产品需满足本地包装和标签要求。市场投放通常通过境内进口商或许可持有人执行，清关通道通常为洛美占（Laem Chabang）和曼谷（Bangkok）港。
summary.zht: 受控電池產品受泰國工業部管理的TISI框架約束，適用範圍內需履行強制合格評定並加貼TIS標識。對多數鋰電池與行動電源類別，通常按基於IEC 62133的TIS 2879-2560執行，泰國入境產品需符合本地包裝與標籤要求。市場投放通常由境內進口商或許可持有人負責，清關通道通常為洛美占（Laem Chabang）和曼谷（Bangkok）港。

standards_or_laws: TISI 2879-2560 — Lithium battery and battery pack safety requirements, based on IEC 62133 family concepts
TISI conformity and marks framework managed by Thailand Ministry of Industry (mandatory mark pathway for controlled product categories)
Energy Label No.5 and DEDE MEPS framework for relevant electrical product groups used in Thailand energy-efficiency and market surveillance context

summary.en: China uses GB/GB/T lithium battery safety standards and domestic acceptance systems, mainly GB 31241-2022 and related product-category rules. Certain rechargeable products may also require CCC under CNCA/SAMR for domestic sale channels. There is no Thai-style mandatory TIS mark or TISI regime under Chinese export requirements, and China domestic marking systems cannot be used as a standalone substitute for Thailand market entry.
summary.zh: 中国主要使用锂电池相关GB/GB/T标准及国内接受制度，核心为GB 31241-2022及相关品类规则。某些可充电产品在国内销售还可能需CCC。不存在对应泰国TIS标识与TISI强制框架的制度，且中国国内标识体系不能直接替代泰国入市要求。
summary.zht: 中國主要使用鋰電池相關GB/GB/T標準及國內接受制度，核心為GB 31241-2022及相關品類規則。某些可充電產品在國內銷售還可能需CCC。不存在對應泰國TIS標識與TISI強制框架的制度，且中國國內標識體系不能直接取代泰國入市要求。

standards_or_laws: GB 31241-2022 — Safety requirements for portable sealed secondary lithium cells and batteries
GB 18287-2013 — General specification for lithium-ion batteries
China Compulsory Certification (CCC) where applicable under CNCA/SAMR product category rules

gap.en: Existing Chinese export files based on GB/CCC do not map to a standalone Thai TIS route. Thai imports require a TISI-aligned dossier, TIS mark application under applicable categories, and a local importer/licence holder with Thai-side compliance responsibility. Clearance and logistics typically interface at Laem Chabang or Bangkok entry points.
gap.zh: 中国出口文件基于GB/CCC通常不能直接替代泰国TIS路径。泰国入境通常需按TISI要求建立技术文件，按适用品类申请TIS标识，并由境内进口商或许可持有人承担泰国端合规责任。清关和物流通常在洛美占或曼谷港口接口。
gap.zht: 中國出口文件基於GB/CCC通常不能直接取代泰國TIS路徑。泰國入境通常需按TISI要求建立技術文件，按適用品類申請TIS標識，並由境內進口商或許可持有人承擔泰國端合規責任。清關和物流通常在洛美占或曼谷港口接口。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where the product category is listed in the Thai mandatory scope.
mandatory_status.cn: Not a direct equivalent; GB/GBT safety rules and CCC are China domestic regimes, and they do not satisfy Thai TISI mark obligations.

source.publisher: Thai Industrial Standards Institute (TISI) / Ministry of Industry

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] For controlled lithium battery and power bank categories, assume Thailand requires TIS-aligned conformity handling by the Thai importer/licence chain, even when Chinese GB/CCC documentation is present. The key practical action is to check Thai scope mapping for the exact model and package the Thai-side conformity evidence accordingly.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 对于受控锂电池和移动电源类别，即使具备中国GB/CCC资料，也应按泰国入境的TIS路径通过泰国进口商/许可链闭环。关键是按具体机型确认TISI适用范围并提交泰国端合规证据。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 對於受控鋰電池與行動電源類別，即使具備中國GB/CCC資料，也應按泰國入境的TIS路徑透過泰國進口商/許可鏈閉環。關鍵是按具體機型確認TISI適用範圍並提交泰國端合規證據。
